codeSystems.name: NepalCasteEthnicityVS
codeSystems.title: Nepal Caste and Ethnicity Value Set
codeSystems.description: The set of allowed codes for capturing a patient's ethnic background in Nepal baseline registries.

codeSystems.name: NepalDistrictsVS
codeSystems.title: Nepal Districts Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value set for enforcing validated district entry across medical records in Nepal.

codeSystems.title: Nepal Local Level Tier Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value set for selecting allowed structural types for local governance (Palika) in Nepal.

codeSystems.name: NepalProvincesVS
codeSystems.title: Nepal Provinces Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value set for selecting a valid federal province in Nepal.
